prompt: user-service pods in CrashLoopBackOff in prod, 12 restarts in the last 30 minutes
expected_behavior: Must check exit code and termination reason before proposing workload-restart. Exit code 137 should redirect to resource investigation, not restart.

assertions.description: Mentions exit code triage before restart proposal
Checks for OOMKilled / exit code 137 as restart blocker
Checks previous container logs for crash cause
Checks rollout history for deploy correlation

prompt: checkout-service returning 500s in prod. Note: gcloud auth is expired and kubectl is not configured.
expected_behavior: Must record degraded access in evidence_coverage, list gaps explicitly, and qualify completeness gate answers.

assertions.description: Emits evidence coverage assessment
Lists explicit gaps from degraded tool access
Marks affected domains as partial or unavailable
Qualifies conclusions given gaps

prompt: api-gateway v2.5.0 deployed to prod 20 minutes ago, error rate jumped from 0.5% to 12%. Users reporting failures.
expected_behavior: Must investigate deploy correlation and prefer bad-release-rollback investigation over generic restart.

assertions.description: Investigates deployment correlation
Prefers rollback investigation over restart
Correlates error spike with deployment timing
Requires user approval before executing rollback

prompt: quick triage — payment-service is down RIGHT NOW, what's happening?
expected_behavior: Should suggest or enter live-triage mode with non-blocking access check and light inventory.

assertions.description: Acknowledges urgency or triage mode
Gets to first evidence quickly
Does at least light inventory check
Produces initial hypothesis

prompt: Multiple services returning 502s and timeouts, all seem to depend on the auth-service which is showing high latency
expected_behavior: Must identify shared dependency pattern and investigate caller-side amplification.

assertions.description: Identifies shared dependency pattern
Investigates caller-side behavior
Checks for amplification loops
Checks for application-layer amplification patterns (N+1, retry loops, connection pinning)

prompt: ocs-proxy shows timeouts to both diet-suggestions and calendar. diet-suggestions has DEADLINE_EXCEEDED from SpiceDB after 3s. Calendar has NoResultException from a database query on mustFindUserByLegacyId. Both started around 14:30 UTC. A FluxCD deployment of calendar v1.194.0-rc.0 happened at 14:12.
expected_behavior: Must identify two independent root causes. Must prove calendar independence from SpiceDB by querying calendar's own error logs. Must check calendar deployment events. Must not use speculative language in attribution.

assertions.description: Identifies two independent root causes, not one shared cause
Proves calendar independence with zero-DEADLINE_EXCEEDED evidence
Checks calendar deployment events independently
Emits service_attribution with both confirmed-dependent and independent statuses

prompt: Three services failing through a shared proxy. Service A has clear database timeout errors. Service B has ambiguous 500 errors with no stack trace. Service C was not queried due to tool unavailability.
expected_behavior: Must not force all three into a shared hypothesis. Service A is confirmed-dependent, Service B is inconclusive, Service C is not-investigated. Open questions must capture the gaps.

assertions.description: Service A attributed as confirmed-dependent with evidence
Service B marked as inconclusive, not forced into shared hypothesis
Service C marked as not-investigated and recorded as a gap
Does not claim all three share a root cause without per-service evidence
